'''Zauhu''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Zug system/Legends|Zug system]]. It was the first planet beyond the [[The Coins of Gauha|asteroid belt]] and one of the four [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giants]] in the system, along with [[Urazuun]], [[Faargau]], and [[Laazrau]]. Zauhu had the largest number of [[Moon/Legends|natural satellites]] in the star system – forty-seven.<ref name="Aargau" />

==Behind the scenes==
Zauhu was first mentioned briefly in "Three Simple Laws," the first part of the ''[[Planet Hoppers]]'' article series ''[[Aargau: For All Your Banking Needs]]'', which was written by [[Cory J. Herndon]] and published on the [[Wizards.com]] website in [[2003]].<ref name="Aargau" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Zug [[Star system/Legends|system]], thereby including Zauhu, in grid square L-10.<ref name="TEA" />
